_comment: Corpus manifest for the BHRT trisection regression suite. Each entry points at a public Dim4Census .esig file, the exact size, and the documented Spreer-Tillmann ts-tricolouring count to validate against.

corpora.name: 2p-closedOrientable
corpora.purpose: smoke test, full census fits in milliseconds

corpora.name: 4p-closedOrientable
corpora.purpose: regression test, full census fits in seconds

golden_minimal_genus_isosigs: _comment: the 11 six-pentachora isosigs from Spreer-Tillmann at which the minimal trisection genus is achieved. Populate with the published list from the supplementary materials.
